catalogData.name: Fire
properties: Physical Resistance, Fire Immunity, Cold Vulnerability
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Infuse Mana
powers.raw: Infuse Mana (Trait): +Force/2 on Combat spell Drain tests

powers.name: Sustain Spell
powers.raw: Sustain Spell (No Action, Sustained): Sustain one Combat spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
powers.text: Sustain one Combat spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

evolvedPowers.name: Banishing Resistance
evolvedPowers.raw: Banishing Resistance (Trait): Double Force vs. Negate

evolvedPowers.name: Firelight
evolvedPowers.raw: Firelight (Complex Action, Sustained): Target can't hide or be invisible. Resist: WIL+AGI
evolvedPowers.text: Target can't hide or be invisible. Resist: WIL+AGI

evolvedPowers.name: Mana Surge
evolvedPowers.raw: Mana Surge (Complex Action, Sustained): +1 to Combat spell damage

elementalFormulaePower.name: Elemental Formulae
elementalFormulaePower.raw: Elemental Formulae (Complex Action, Sustained): 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
elementalFormulaePower.text: 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

greatFormPowers.name: Energy Aura
greatFormPowers.raw: Energy Aura (Trait): Melee attackers that hit elemental take (Force)P Fire damage. Resist: BOD+Armor
greatFormPowers.text: Melee attackers that hit elemental take (Force)P Fire damage. Resist: BOD+Armor

greatFormPowers.name: Engulf
greatFormPowers.raw: Engulf (Trait): When melee attack hits, target is Grabbed and takes (Force)P fire damage every Combat Turn. Resist: BOD+Armor
greatFormPowers.text: When melee attack hits, target is Grabbed and takes (Force)P fire damage every Combat Turn. Resist: BOD+Armor
